creator: voh.ron@gmail.com
text:
Having trouble builing port when mysql is enabled:

libtool: compile:  cc -I../include -I. -I../agent -I../agent/helpers -I../agent/mibgroup -I../snmplib -I/usr/local/include/mysql -I/usr/local/include/mysql/mysql -I/usr/include -DNETSNMP_ENABLE_IPV6 -fno-strict-aliasing -O2 -pipe -march=native -I/usr/local/include -I/include -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing -std=c99 -Ufreebsd11 -Dfreebsd11=freebsd11 -DHAS_FPSETMASK -DHAS_FLOATINGPOINT_H -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe -fstack-protector-strong -I/usr/local/include -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2 -I/usr/local/lib/perl5/5.24/mach/CORE -c snmptrapd.c -o snmptrapd.o >/dev/null 2>&1
/bin/sh ../libtool --mode=link cc -DNETSNMP_ENABLE_IPV6 -fno-strict-aliasing -O2 -pipe -march=native  -I/usr/local/include -I/include -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing -std=c99 -Ufreebsd11 -Dfreebsd11=freebsd11  -DHAS_FPSETMASK -DHAS_FLOATINGPOINT_H -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe -fstack-protector-strong -I/usr/local/include -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2  -I/usr/local/lib/perl5/5.24/mach/CORE -o snmptrapd snmptrapd.lo libnetsnmptrapd.la -L/usr/lib -lm -lkvm -ldevstat -L/lib -L/usr/local/lib ../agent/libnetsnmpmibs.la ../agent/libnetsnmpagent.la ../snmplib/libnetsnmp.la -L/usr/local/lib/mysql/ -lmariadb -lz -lm -lpthread -liconv -lssl -lcrypto -liconv  -lelf -lpkg -lssp_nonshared -Wl,-R/usr/local/lib/perl5/5.24/mach/CORE
libtool: link: cc -DNETSNMP_ENABLE_IPV6 -fno-strict-aliasing -O2 -pipe -march=native -I/usr/local/include -I/include -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing -std=c99 -Ufreebsd11 -Dfreebsd11=freebsd11 -DHAS_FPSETMASK -DHAS_FLOATINGPOINT_H -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe -fstack-protector-strong -I/usr/local/include -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2 -I/usr/local/lib/perl5/5.24/mach/CORE -o .libs/snmptrapd .libs/snmptrapd.o -Wl,-R/usr/local/lib/perl5/5.24/mach/CORE  ./.libs/libnetsnmptrapd.so /usr/ports/net-mgmt/net-snmp/work/net-snmp-5.7.3/agent/.libs/libnetsnmpmibs.so -L/usr/lib -L/lib -L/usr/local/lib -L/usr/local/lib/perl5/5.24/mach/CORE ../agent/.libs/libnetsnmpmibs.so /usr/ports/net-mgmt/net-snmp/work/net-snmp-5.7.3/agent/.libs/libnetsnmpagent.so ../agent/.libs/libnetsnmpagent.so /usr/ports/net-mgmt/net-snmp/work/net-snmp-5.7.3/snmplib/.libs/libnetsnmp.so ../snmplib/.libs/libnetsnmp.so -L/usr/local/lib/mysql/ -lmariadb -lz -lssl -liconv -lwrap -lperl -lpthread -lcrypt -lutil -lelf -lpkg -lssp_nonshared -lm -lkvm -ldevstat -lcrypto  -Wl,-rpath -Wl,/usr/local/lib
./.libs/libnetsnmptrapd.so: undefined reference to `load_defaults'
./.libs/libnetsnmptrapd.so: undefined reference to `my_init'
cc: error: linker command failed with exit code 1 (use -v to see invocation)
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[3]: stopped in /usr/ports/net-mgmt/net-snmp/work/net-snmp-5.7.3/apps
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[2]: stopped in /usr/ports/net-mgmt/net-snmp/work/net-snmp-5.7.3
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[1]: stopped in /usr/ports/net-mgmt/net-snmp
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/net-mgmt/net-snmp


#uname -a 
FreeBSD myhost.local 11.0-RELEASE-p12 FreeBSD 11.0-RELEASE-p12 #0: Wed Aug  9 10:03:39 UTC 2017     root@amd64-builder.daemonology.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64
